configurations.name: lease-gen
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const root='C:/Users/User/Desktop/Projects/租屋系統';const mime={'.html':'text/html','.js':'text/javascript','.css':'text/css','.json':'application/json','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.pdf':'application/pdf'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let fp=path.join(root,decodeURIComponent(req.url==='/'?'/租約產生器.html':req.url));fs.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(fp);res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime[ext]||'text/html','Cache-Control':'no-store'});res.end(d);}});}).listen(8090,()=>console.log('Server on 8090'));
